results.name: naruto run
results.description: A running pose with one's body bent forward and arms following behind.

results.name: naya ferocious
results.description: Cards that care about you controlling creatures with power 5 or greater.

results.name: necrogen vent
results.description: Natural vents that spew green necrogen fumes, found in Mirrodin's Mephidross swampland.

results.name: negative image
results.description: The colors and/or light and dark areas in all or part of the image are inverted.

results.name: nemesis-mega-cycle
results.description: A currently incomplete cycle of creatures printed in commander precons that provide a pseudo-targeted static ability that impacts a single opponent.

results.name: neo-regenerate
results.description: An activated ability that says "this gains indestructible; tap it" is the new Regenerate.

results.name: neurok
results.description: An ethnic group of humans on Mirrodin.

results.name: neutral background
results.description: A flat color or gradient background with no details.

results.name: nevermore
results.description: Cards with a certain name can't be cast. See also [lobotomy](/tags/card/lobotomy), where certain cards can't be exist.

results.name: new capenna faction symbol
results.description: Faction symbols found in New Capenna.

results.name: new phyrexia
results.description: An artificial plane invaded by the Phyrexians. It was previously Mirrodin.
